mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS totalVisitors, COUNT(*) AS totalPageViews, 0 AS avgDuration, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN connect_type = 'NEW' THEN user_id END) AS newVisitors FROM TB_USER_ACCESS_LOG WHERE connect_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}

SELECT CAST(connect_dt AS DATE) AS access_date, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS visitor_cnt, COUNT(*) AS page_view_cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN connect_type = 'NEW' THEN user_id END) AS new_visitor_cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN connect_type = 'RETURN' THEN user_id END) AS return_visitor_cnt, 0 AS avg_duration FROM TB_USER_ACCESS_LOG WHERE connect_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY CAST(connect_dt AS DATE) ORDER BY access_date DESC

SELECT connect_url AS page_url, connect_url AS page_title, COUNT(*) AS visit_cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS unique_visitor_cnt, 0 AS avg_duration FROM TB_USER_ACCESS_LOG WHERE connect_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND connect_url IS NOT NULL GROUP BY connect_url ORDER BY visit_cnt DESC

SELECT browser, browser_ver, COUNT(*) AS cnt, CAST(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_USER_ACCESS_LOG WHERE connect_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}) AS DECIMAL(5,2)) AS percentage FROM TB_USER_ACCESS_LOG WHERE connect_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND browser IS NOT NULL GROUP BY browser, browser_ver ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT os, os_ver, COUNT(*) AS cnt, CAST(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_USER_ACCESS_LOG WHERE connect_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}) AS DECIMAL(5,2)) AS percentage FROM TB_USER_ACCESS_LOG WHERE connect_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND os IS NOT NULL GROUP BY os, os_ver ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT access_seq, user_id, user_nm, org_code, org_nm, public_ip, private_ip, connect_dt, connect_yn, browser, os, session_id FROM TB_ADMIN_ACCESS_LOG WHERE connect_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY connect_dt DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_USER_ACCESS_LOG ( user_id, user_nm, connect_type, org_code, org_nm, public_ip, private_ip, mac_addr, connect_dt, connect_action, connect_url, browser, terminal, browser_ver, os, os_ver, session_id ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userNm}, #{connectType}, #{orgCode}, #{orgNm}, #{publicIp}, #{privateIp}, #{macAddr}, GETDATE(), #{connectAction}, #{connectUrl}, #{browser}, #{terminal}, #{browserVer}, #{os}, #{osVer}, #{sessionId} )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN board_status = 'W' THEN 1 END) AS wait_cnt, COUNT(CASE WHEN board_status = 'R' THEN 1 END) AS proc_cnt, COUNT(CASE WHEN board_status = 'C' THEN 1 END) AS comp_cnt, COUNT(CASE WHEN board_status = 'H' THEN 1 END) AS hold_cnt, COUNT(*) AS total_cnt FROM TB_BOARD_INFO WHERE 1=1
AND sys_id = #{sysId}

SELECT CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS stat_date, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS user_cnt, COUNT(*) AS access_cnt, 0 AS board_cnt FROM TB_USER_ACCESS_LOG WHERE CAST(connect_dt AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
